name: year offset range no duplicate base years
description: Verifies that year_offset range columns do not expand base_years and do not produce a redundant LEFT JOIN when no WHERE filter exists on the offset column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024,2025,2026]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", COUNT(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025, 2026) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t82aa6d352dc33c53a5a7d0a40c78cdf6" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", COUNT(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2024_PRE_WEEK_1', '2024_PRE_WEEK_2', '2024_PRE_WEEK_3', '2024_PRE_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_1', '2024_REG_WEEK_2', '2024_REG_WEEK_3', '2024_REG_WEEK_4', '2024_REG_WEEK_5', '2024_REG_WEEK_6', '2024_REG_WEEK_7', '2024_REG_WEEK_8', '2024_REG_WEEK_9', '2024_REG_WEEK_10', '2024_REG_WEEK_11', '2024_REG_WEEK_12', '2024_REG_WEEK_13', '2024_REG_WEEK_14', '2024_REG_WEEK_15', '2024_REG_WEEK_16', '2024_REG_WEEK_17', '2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2024_POST_WEEK_1', '2024_POST_WEEK_2', '2024_POST_WEEK_3', '2024_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025, 2026) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_atts_from_plays" AS "rush_atts_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(t82aa6d352dc33c53a5a7d0a40c78cdf6.rush_atts_from_plays) FROM t82aa6d352dc33c53a5a7d0a40c78cdf6 WHERE t82aa6d352dc33c53a5a7d0a40c78cdf6.pid = player.pid AND t82aa6d352dc33c53a5a7d0a40c78cdf6.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 30) AS "rush_atts_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e" on "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."year" = 2024 where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t0c5e60186e061ea413a1099303dd3a2e"."rush_atts_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
